Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.tests

Class ProofDependenciesTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.tests.AbstractProofTreeTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.tests.ProofDependenciesTests
All Implemented Interfaces:
IProofTreeChangedListener
public class ProofDependenciesTests extends AbstractProofTreeTests
Unit tests for proof dependencies.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    private static class 
    ProofDependenciesTests.DependencyMatcher
    Represents expected dependencies built one piece at a time with reasonable defaults.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    allIDependencies()
    Ensures that dependencies are correctly computed for the allI reasoner: free identifiers have been introduced.
    private void
    assertProofReusable(IProofTree proofTree)
     
    void
    contextDependencies()
     
    void
    disjEDependencies()
    Ensures that dependencies are correctly computed for the disjE reasoner: dependencies are correctly computed for a split node.
    void
    forwardInferenceDependencies()
    Ensures that dependencies are correctly computed for a forward inference reasoner.
    void
    hypDependencies()
    Ensures that dependencies are correctly computed for the hyp reasoner (used hypothesis and goal).
    void
    lemmaDependencies()
    Ensures that dependencies are correctly computed for the lemma reasoner: only used identifiers are present.
    private IProofTree
    makeProofTree(String sequentImage)
     
    void
    rewriteDependencies()
    Ensures that dependencies are correctly computed for a rewriting reasoner.
    void
    twoReasoners()
    Ensures that dependencies are correctly computed for two cascaded reasoners: the hypothesis produced by one and used by the other is not in the dependencies.

    • ProofDependenciesTests

  • Method Details

    • hypDependencies

      public void hypDependencies() throws Exception
      Ensures that dependencies are correctly computed for the hyp reasoner (used hypothesis and goal).
      Throws:
      Exception

    • twoReasoners

      public void twoReasoners() throws Exception
      Ensures that dependencies are correctly computed for two cascaded reasoners: the hypothesis produced by one and used by the other is not in the dependencies.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • lemmaDependencies

      public void lemmaDependencies() throws Exception
      Ensures that dependencies are correctly computed for the lemma reasoner: only used identifiers are present.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • allIDependencies

      public void allIDependencies() throws Exception
      Ensures that dependencies are correctly computed for the allI reasoner: free identifiers have been introduced.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • disjEDependencies

      public void disjEDependencies() throws Exception
      Ensures that dependencies are correctly computed for the disjE reasoner: dependencies are correctly computed for a split node.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • contextDependencies

      public void contextDependencies() throws Exception
      Throws:
      Exception

    • rewriteDependencies

      public void rewriteDependencies() throws Exception
      Ensures that dependencies are correctly computed for a rewriting reasoner. The sequent contains two hypotheses that get rewritten, but only one of them contributes to the proof.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • forwardInferenceDependencies

      public void forwardInferenceDependencies() throws Exception
      Ensures that dependencies are correctly computed for a forward inference reasoner. The sequent contains two hypotheses that get rewritten, but only one of them contributes to the proof.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • makeProofTree

      private IProofTree makeProofTree(String sequentImage)

    • assertProofReusable

      private void assertProofReusable(IProofTree proofTree)
